creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text: Antoine, can you reset thunderx1, so it doesn't try to build r458184..r458948 ports tree snapshots? It'd be nice to catch aarch64-specific Clang crashes earlier which requires exposing Clang to more ports which requires more recent ports tree snapshots to get C++11/etc fixes. For one, r458184 snapshot lacks many fixes by me and kde@.
